core.label: CQL Fundamentals
core.description: Cassandra Query Language for distributed NoSQL.

topics.label: Cassandra Setup
topics.description: Install Apache Cassandra and use cqlsh. CQL looks like SQL but models data differently.

topics.label: Keyspaces & Tables
topics.description: CREATE KEYSPACE with replication strategy, CREATE TABLE with partition and clustering keys.

topics.label: Data Types
topics.description: text, int, bigint, float, double, boolean, timestamp, uuid, map, set, list.

topics.label: Primary Keys
topics.description: Partition key + clustering columns. Partition key determines data distribution.

topics.label: SELECT & WHERE
topics.description: Query by partition key. WHERE is restricted to primary key columns (query-driven modeling).

topics.label: INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE
topics.description: Upsert semantics — INSERT and UPDATE are equivalent. TTL for auto-expiry.

topics.label: Data Modeling
topics.description: Denormalization, query-first design, and one-table-per-query pattern.

topics.label: Batch & Lightweight Transactions
topics.description: BATCH for atomic writes, IF for compare-and-set (Paxos).
